final_prompt.prompt:
Create an interior design illustration of a 新中式 tea room.

Style/medium: needs a "新中式" aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a solid wood tea table, a 紫砂壶 and tea cups
Scene/backdrop: must include calligraphy scrolls and bonsai as background, bamboo shadows visible through a window
Lighting/mood: needs a zen, contemplative atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include natural wood surfaces and ceramic textures
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
